name: maloja
tagline: A self-hosted music listening tracker with detailed stats and charts
description: Maloja is a self-hosted music listening tracker, similar to Last.fm. It tracks play history locally and offers detailed stats, charts, artist history, and API access—all without third-party tracking.

features.title: Music Scrobbling Server
features.description: Collect and store music listening history

features.title: Listening Statistics
features.description: View play counts and listening trends

features.title: Artist and Track Pages
features.description: Browse detailed artist and track information

features.title: Web Interface
features.description: View listening data through a browser

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Run the server on your own infrastructure
